description_long: This object consists of five distinct athletic shoes, each featuring a low-cut design and a rounded toe. The shoes display a variety of vibrant color schemes, including black with gold, pink with gray, black with red and blue patterns, solid purple, and a multicolored blue and red geometric pattern. All shoes have white or light gray laces in a standard criss-cross pattern and black collars around the ankle area. The surfaces appear smooth and slightly glossy, with synthetic materials likely used for both the upper and sole. The shoes are clean, show no visible signs of wear, and are likely intended for sports or casual urban use. One shoe features a visible yellow lightning bolt and the word 'TJOY' on the side, suggesting a possible brand or model name.
description: A set of five colorful, low-cut athletic shoes with smooth, glossy surfaces and white laces, each featuring unique color patterns and clean, unworn appearances.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toes, lace patterns, and the distinct color schemes of each shoe.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profiles, including the 'TJOY' branding and lightning bolt on the gold and black shoe, and the geometric patterns on the multicolored shoe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel shapes, black collars, and the back color details of each shoe.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the lateral designs, including the full visibility of the 'TJOY' logo and the intricate side patterns.
attribute_logo: yellow lightning bolt and 'TJOY' text on the side of the black and gold shoe
